title: ABB India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: ABB India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? ABB India in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About ABB India:
ABB India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India!
